LanguageData.ABY_CraftInfernalCombatFrame.label: forge infernal combat frame
LanguageData.ABY_CraftInfernalCombatFrame.description: Assemble the torso frame of the first infernal combat line from residue-lined plating, reinforced plasteel ribs and a sealed chest-core lattice. Heavier than the helm, but still cut for active combat instead of ceremonial bulk.
